overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character walking through a rain-soaked neon-lit commercial district at night. The character follows pedestrians along a sidewalk lined with holographic billboards and Japanese-inspired storefronts before crossing a busy intersection with futuristic traffic.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial sidewalk with holographic advertisements

events.description: passing by large pink circular holographic billboard on the right

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk following a pedestrian in a yellow and black jacket

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in yellow and black jacket walking ahead of ego at steady pace

entered.detail: black metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street with vehicles passing by
large circular billboard displaying animated woman with pink neon background and Japanese text
skyscrapers covered in vertical neon signs and holographic advertisements
string of red paper lanterns hanging above the storefront awnings
rain-soaked sidewalk tiles reflecting pink and blue neon lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked commercial sidewalk at night, lined with a metal railing on the left and vibrant holographic billboards on the right. The camera follows a pedestrian through a canyon of neon-lit skyscrapers, passing red paper lanterns and reflective wet pavement while sparse traffic moves along the street to the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with closed storefronts and horror-themed advertisement

events.description: overtaking pedestrian with glowing blue cybernetic headgear
passing green billboard with scary face and Dellamorte text

agents.ego_description: continuing down the sidewalk, overtaking a pedestrian with illuminated cybernetic headgear

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with glowing blue cybernetic helmet and dark clothing walking in same direction

entered.detail: vertical digital billboard displaying scary green face with text and hand gesture
metal roll-down shutters on closed shops with some illuminated signage above
digital street sign displaying speed limit of 40

segments.scene_description: The character continues past the initial billboards into a section with closed storefronts on the right and a prominent green horror-themed billboard on the left. The metal railing recedes into the distance as the character overtakes a pedestrian with glowing cybernetic headgear, approaching a digital speed limit sign and traffic light ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and futuristic traffic

events.description: reaching the intersection and beginning to cross the street
black sports car turns and drives past the crosswalk

agents.ego_description: stepping onto the crosswalk and crossing the intersection while observing passing traffic

notable_agents.action: sleek black sports car with illuminated accents turning through the intersection

entered.detail: yellow zebra crossing lines painted on the asphalt street
tall pole with red traffic signals and street name signs
futuristic black vehicle with red taillights and sleek aerodynamic design

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a wide intersection, transitioning from the enclosed sidewalk to an open crosswalk. As the character crosses the wet asphalt, a futuristic black sports car turns through the intersection. The traffic light pole stands on the left while the neon skyscrapers shift to frame the left side of the view, creating an expansive urban vista.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a claustrophobic, neon-lit commercial corridor that gradually opens into a wide, expansive urban intersection. It begins on a rain-soaked sidewalk, tracking a pedestrian past vibrant holographic billboards and red paper lanterns that reflect off the wet pavement. As the camera moves forward, the environment shifts toward a stretch of closed storefronts and a prominent green horror-themed billboard, passing a pedestrian with glowing cybernetic headgear. The scene then expands as the character leaves the enclosed sidewalk to enter a wide crosswalk, where the perspective opens up to reveal a futuristic black sports car turning through the intersection. Finally, the view widens into a vast urban vista, with towering neon skyscrapers framing the left side of the frame under the glow of the city lights.
